subject: Interview scheduling — Sr. Frontend Engineer at Vectrix

messages.subject: Interview scheduling — Sr. Frontend Engineer at Vectrix
messages.body_text:
Hi Anya,

Thank you for completing the take-home assignment. We were genuinely impressed — the P95/P99 latency chart implementation was exactly the kind of thinking we're looking for.

We'd like to move forward with the final panel:
- Technical deep dive (60 min): Marcus Webb + Liam Nakamura
- Product/culture panel (60 min): Dana Reeves + Priya Chandran

We can combine into a half-day on the same day, or split across two separate days. Would February 27 work? We're flexible on timing.

Nina Kowalski (CC'd) manages our scheduling and will coordinate once we have a date.

— Marcus Webb
CTO, Vectrix Labs
marcus@vectrix.io

messages.subject: Re: Interview scheduling — Sr. Frontend Engineer at Vectrix
messages.body_text:
Hi Marcus,

Thank you — I'm glad the take-home landed well. I had a lot of fun with the latency chart problem.

Feb 27 works well for me. I'd prefer the combined half-day if possible — 10am–1pm PT with a short break between the two panels. Does that work for the team?
messages.body_html:

messages.subject: Re: Interview scheduling — calendar invite sent
messages.body_text:
Hi Anya,

Perfect — 10am–1pm PT on Feb 27 is confirmed. Calendar invite attached.

Schedule:
- 10:00–11:00am PT: Technical deep dive (Marcus Webb + Liam Nakamura)
- 11:00–11:15am PT: Break
- 11:15am–12:15pm PT: Product/culture panel (Dana Reeves + Priya Chandran)

Zoom link is in the invite. Please let me know if you need anything before then.

— Nina Kowalski
Ops & People, Vectrix Labs
nina@vectrix.io
